name: hold-your-voice
description: Portable voice matching and AI-writing elimination. Works in any AI coding tool (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Command Code, etc).

interface.shortDescription: Match a writer's voice and remove AI drift.
interface.longDescription: Build a voice profile from real writing samples, scan drafts for generic AI cadence, and rewrite only the flagged lines. The profile evolves with every session — patterns you accept get stronger, patterns you ignore fade away. Works everywhere: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Command Code, any terminal.
defaultPrompt: Build a voice profile from these samples.
Remove AI-writing patterns from this draft.
Rewrite this in my voice without flattening it.
